'''Orax''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Crystal/Legends|crystalline]] [[Shard (species)|Shard]].

The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] discovered the planet in [[119 BBY|119]] [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], and Orax became known for its wondrous mineral formations. With the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], many Shard ambassadors operating off world were murdered, and their homeworld became a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] center using [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] labor. Further, many Shard colonies were destroyed.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Shards allied themselves with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in order to free their homeworld.

{{Planet-stub}}
